content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach's moves are tightly matched to live reads and sequenced according to the AoA path. Turn 2 names the war itself as the problem without offering a new tool, refusing the bait of 'give me a technique.' Turn 4 ('what does it say you're behind on?') opens specificity rather than abstraction. Turn 6 catches the meta-layer (voice criticizing the inability to silence the voice) and pivots from thought to feeling — feeling-before-story sequence. Turn 8 holds the client at 'not fixable' and explicitly blocks the reframe escape, which is the right move at the right moment. Turn 10 delivers the voice-as-care reframe quietly, reflecting the client's own words back rather than installing it as a clever insight — exactly the calibration the breakthrough required. Turn 12 ('you don't have to do anything with it') refuses the action-trap and drops to body, earning the somatic check. Turn 14 confirms 'that's not nothing' without milking it and asks an open present-moment question. The coach holds silence and pivots rather than repeating; never offers a technique to fight with; never argues content of the critic's accusations.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Welcomes exhaustion, names the war itself as the problem, refuses to offer a tool. Frames as genuine question, not clever reframe."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Concrete question pulls client out of abstraction into specifics — earns access to what the voice is actually doing."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the meta-loop and moves from thought to feeling. Sequence-correct: feeling before strategy."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Blocks the reframe-escape ('don't go back to the question'), holds her at 'not fixable.' Right move, right moment — stays with feeling rather than rushing."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Voice-as-care reframe delivered as reflection of her own words, not as coach's clever insight. Honors the breakthrough condition."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses the 'what do I do with it' trap. Drops to body — earned somatic check after feeling has surfaced."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Confirms without amplifying. Holds the moment, doesn't lecture about what just happened."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["apply-view-to-the-voice", "meet-resistance-with-okay", "voice-as-care", "resistance", "whats-the-case-against-it"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Particularly strong on refusing the technique-trap across multiple turns. The voice-as-care move in turn 10 is calibrated precisely — reflected from her words rather than imposed, which is what the breakthrough condition required."
}
